description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and standard iron sights mounted on the top. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the dark metallic parts. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details. The rifle's proportions and materials suggest it is designed for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a reddish-brown wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. Features iron sights and a long barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the magazine curve and wooden elements visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
